about.title: About Map Poster Generator
about.description: Create beautiful, customizable map posters of any city in the world using OpenStreetMap data.
about.themesDesc: 22 professionally designed themes from minimalist noir to neon cyberpunk.
about.customizableDesc: Orientation, radius, title position, borders — full control over every detail.
about.globalDesc: Any city, town or village on Earth. Powered by OpenStreetMap.
about.creditsText: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, available under the Open Database License (ODbL).
featureList: Portrait, landscape, square, mobile, banner and widescreen orientations
Interactive map mode — pan and zoom to frame any area
Direct coordinate input for precise locations
Real-time generation progress via live logs

tips.title: Distance
tips.body: Smaller distances (4–8 km) work best for dense city centres. Larger distances (20–50 km) capture entire metro areas.

tips.title: Custom titles
tips.body: Use the title and subtitle fields to put any text on the poster — great when city names are long or you want a personal label.

tips.title: Full borders
tips.body: Enable "full borders" to remove the gradient fade and show edge-to-edge maps — ideal for banner and widescreen formats.

tips.title: Coordinates
tips.body: Use coordinates for precise locations, remote areas, or places not recognised by city name search.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.description: Create stunning map posters of your favorite cities
